mapper.sql:
AA.MEMB_SEQ AS SEQ , AA.MEMB_ID AS MEMB_ID
, AA.MEMB_NAME AS MEMB_NAME , AA.MEMB_PHONE AS PHONE , AA.MEMB_EMAIL AS EMAIL , AA.USE_YN AS USE_YN
, AA.PSWD_CHNG_DTTM AS PWD_CHNG_DATE , AA.PSWD_ERR_CNT AS PWD_ERR_COUNT , AA.PSWD_INIT_YN AS PWD_INIT_YN , AA.PSWD_EXP_DTTM AS PWD_EXPIRED_DATE
, AA.RCT_ACS_DTTM AS LAST_ACCESS_DATE , AA.RCT_ACS_IP AS LAST_ACCESS_IP , AA.RGTR AS RGTR_SEQ , AA.RGT_DTTM AS RGT_DATE , AA.CHNR AS CHNR_SEQ , AA.CHNG_DTTM AS CHNG_DATE

if.test: searchField == "all" and searchText != null and searchText != ""

sql.if: AND ( AA.MEMB_ID LIKE ('%' || #{searchText} || '%') OR AA.MEMB_PHONE LIKE ('%' || #{searchText} || '%') OR AA.MEMB_EMAIL LIKE ('%' || #{searchText} || '%'))

mapper.select: /* com.erns.coching.member.mapper.AdminMemberDAO.selectBackOfficeUserListCount */ SELECT count(*) AS CNT FROM t_memb_admin_inf AA JOIN t_memb_admin_inf_BACKOFFICE_INFO BB ON AA.MEMB_SEQ = BB.MEMB_ID
